text.title: Java Spring Boot Enterprise Patterns Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the enterprise Spring Boot 3 patterns. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Every domain entity MUST extend a shared `BaseEntity` superclass providing `@Id @GeneratedValue UUID id`, `@CreationTimestamp createdAt`, `@UpdateTimestamp updatedAt`, and `@Version Long version`.
rule.rationale: Sequential `Long` ids expose enumeration; missing `@Version` allows silent lost updates; per-entity audit columns drift; a base class fixes all three with one inheritance.

rule.statement: API DTOs MUST be Java records distinct from entities. Mapping MUST go through MapStruct annotation processor. Hand-written mappers and `BeanUtils.copyProperties` are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Annotation-processor mappers fail at compile when a property goes missing; records guarantee immutability across the API surface.

rule.statement: Service classes MUST default to `@Transactional(readOnly = true)` at the class level. Write methods override locally with `@Transactional`.
rule.rationale: Read-only default lets Hibernate skip dirty checking and JDBC flush — a meaningful win on read-heavy endpoints — and forces writes to be explicit.

rule.statement: Dynamic-filter search endpoints MUST use `JpaSpecificationExecutor<Entity>` + composable `Specification<Entity>` builders. String-concatenated JPQL for filter composition is forbidden.
rule.rationale: String-concat invites SQL injection and breaks paginator binding; Specifications give type-safe, composable filters.

rule.statement: Errors MUST surface as RFC 7807 `ProblemDetail` via a single `@RestControllerAdvice`. Custom JSON error shapes are forbidden.
rule.rationale: One contract lets every client implement a single parser; ad-hoc shapes multiply parsing logic and miss security-relevant fields.

rule.statement: Services MUST expose Actuator (`/actuator/health`, `/actuator/prometheus`) and Micrometer metrics. Spring Security MUST be on the classpath with default authentication on Actuator endpoints other than `/health`.
rule.rationale: Health probes drive zero-downtime deploys; Prometheus metrics drive alerting; Actuator endpoints without auth leak environment + health detail to the public internet.
